matchingDescription: UK commission-free investment app for beginner and intermediate investors, stocks and shares ISA, SIPP, dividend investing, 1.6 million users

variants.text: Freetrade is an award-winning investment platform used by 1.6 million users. Invest commission-free in 7,600+ UK and global investments via ISA, SIPP, or GIA.
Open a free Stocks and Shares ISA with Freetrade and start investing commission-free across thousands of UK and global investments.
Freetrade's SIPP lets you invest for retirement commission-free, alongside ISA and GIA accounts, in 7,600+ investments.

A single £9.99 trading fee on a £500 investment represents a 2% cost before any market movement. Freetrade charges zero commission on UK and US trades — a structural cost advantage that compounds over a long-term investment horizon.

HMRC data shows only 37% of UK adults hold any ISA, with the average stocks and shares ISA balance at £29,000. Commission charges on frequent rebalancing can consume 0.5–1% of portfolio value annually — a cost that zero-commission platforms eliminate.

UK retail investment platform accounts grew by 1.2 million in 2023 according to FCA data, driven largely by younger investors. The proportion of 18-34 year olds holding a stocks and shares ISA doubled between 2019 and 2023.

FTSE 100 companies paid £78.8bn in dividends in 2023 (AJ Bell Dividend Dashboard). Investors who reinvested dividends in UK equities over 20 years saw returns roughly double those of non-reinvestors — and commission-free platforms remove the cost barrier to frequent reinvestment.
